title: Sqlitelogictest - Algebra operators priority in select query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value1 Int32, value2 Int32, value3 Nullable(Int32));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value1, value2) VALUES (1, 85, 52), (2, 50, 82);
SELECT value1 * value2 + COALESCE(value3, 0) * -1 FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT (value1 * value2) + (value3 * 0) FROM test_table WHERE id = 2;
key_bug_features: Algebra operators priority in select query
